description: A Solar Energy Installation Manager is evaluating a 1,000 kW DC (1 MW) ground-mount commercial PV project near Phoenix, AZ. The objective is to quantify the energy production and capacity factor differences between three mounting solutions—Fixed Open Rack (array_type 0, tilt 30°), Single-Axis Tracking (array_type 2, tilt 0°), and Dual-Axis Tracking (array_type 4, tilt 0°)—using PySAM's Pvwattsv8 module (pre-installed; do not use the SAM GUI). The base system configuration requires a 1000 kW DC capacity, module type 0, DC-to-AC ratio 1.2, 14.08% losses, 96
